citations.excerpt: Draft contains full name in header and body.
Matriculation number from NHS Lothian form.
Reference to bank statement with transaction details.
No redaction annotations found in draft.

findings.text: Complaint draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d includes full name 'Anfal Elbushra' in multiple sections.
Draft includes matriculation number '40805511' from NAP-SRC-0013.
Draft references bank statement NAP-SRC-0012 with transaction details (e.g., Uber Eats, PrettyLittleThing) that may reveal spending patterns.
No explicit redaction annotations or privacy-preserving measures observed in draft; privacy_redaction gate requires review of personal data exposure.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Redaction Annotations for Complaint Draft

- **Full Name**: Replace all instances of 'Anfal Elbushra' with '[Student]' or initials.
- **Matriculation Number**: Replace '40805511' with '[Matriculation Number]'.
- **Bank Transactions**: Remove specific merchant names and amounts; replace with '[Transaction details redacted]' or summarize as 'various personal expenses'.
- **Dates**: Consider redacting exact dates of transactions to prevent re-identification.
- **NHS Form Reference**: Redact any personal identifiers from NAP-SRC-0013 excerpt (e.g., signature, date).
proposed_artifacts.title: Redaction annotations for complaint draft

proposed_tasks.instructions: Apply redaction annotations from candidate/napier-accommodation-arrears-full-redaction-review/redaction_annotations.md to complaint draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d. Replace personal identifiers with placeholders, remove sensitive transaction details, and ensure compliance with privacy_redaction gate.
proposed_tasks.title: Apply redactions to complaint draft

redaction_flags.text: Full name 'Anfal Elbushra' appears unredacted; consider replacing with initials or 'the student' where appropriate.
Matriculation number '40805511' should be redacted or replaced with a placeholder.
Specific transaction descriptions (e.g., 'Uber Eats', 'PrettyLittleThing') may need redaction; retain only aggregate figures.

risk_flags.text: Draft exposes full name and matriculation number without apparent redaction; risk of privacy breach if shared outside authorized parties.
Bank statement references may inadvertently disclose sensitive financial behavior.
No redaction guidance or policy evident in draft; compliance with privacy_redaction gate uncertain.

summary: Redaction review of complaint draft art-0e6fe6dbf06942e19dc6c1baa3b40b6d against sources NAP-SRC-0012 and NAP-SRC-0013. Draft contains personal identifiers (name, matriculation number, bank details) that may require redaction under privacy_redaction gate. No explicit redaction instructions found in draft; review identifies potential PII exposure. Proposed follow-up task to apply redactions.

uncertainties.text: Whether full name must be redacted under privacy_redaction gate; depends on intended audience and consent.
Whether matriculation number is considered personal data requiring redaction in this context.
Extent of bank transaction detail that should be redacted to avoid revealing financial patterns.
